reasoning: The control 'IA-5 (7) - No Embedded Unencrypted Static Authenticators' focuses on ensuring that static authenticators (like passwords or tokens) are not stored in an unencrypted form. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that Secrets are not stored in plain text and are encrypted at rest, particularly in etcd. Additionally, using external secret management solutions can help manage and rotate secrets securely.
title: Authenticator Management | No Embedded Unencrypted Static Authenticators
